title: Modilla Texture Pack
description: A simple Vanilla+ texture pack with quality of life changes, fixes and texture improvements.
body:
![Thumbnail + Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oOBZGVmz/images/31e8a92c48d155f9af263148104f7688c1ee07ef.png)A simple Vanilla+ texture pack with quality of life changes, fixes and texture improvements. 

## Summary ✅
This texture pack adds many changes that make your experience better without losing it's vanilla feel. The changes can range from small quality of life changes to whole texture reworks.

## Features ✨
- some textures are smoother and more pleasing to the eye
- variated block textures
- custom bed textures
- variated villagers
- sunflowers look beautiful
- more 3D blocks
- (truly) centered chiseled stone bricks
- custom skin background in inventories
- smiling axolotls :)

## Quality of life changes 🔨
- fire is lower (when burning)
- water is clearer
- grass is shorter
- tools textures change depending on how broken they are
- fully aged crops marker
- visual sapling growth
- visual changes for redstone-related blocks
- unique dye textures

This texture pack also fixes some bugs and improves the consistency between the textures. There's much more but I forgor. This texture pack was created with [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/). Some textures are custom made by me.
